summary_text: The team discussed project architecture decisions. Alice proposed using a microservices approach with gRPC for inter-service communication. Bob agreed and suggested adding a gateway service for REST API exposure. Key decisions: (1) Use PostgreSQL with pgvector for embeddings, (2) Django for gateway service, (3) React with TypeScript for frontend. The team also discussed timeline, targeting a 3-month delivery window with bi-weekly milestones.
